title: thalictrum minus subsp. maxwellii
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. maxwellii, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations due to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Thalictrum minus subsp. maxwellii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
